_publications._publicationTitle: A haploinsufficiency restoration strategy corrects neurobehavioral deficits in Nf1+/- mice.

_contextSnippet: As expected, Nf1+/- mice that were WT for Fbxw11 (NF1) showed increased hyperactivity in the OF task measured by total distance traveled
details: Exhibited increased hyperactivity in open field task measured by total distance traveled
